'''zapawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvero|uvero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvero|uvero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zapawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæpæwæth|zæpæwæth]] || [[word:zæpæwæj|zæpæwæj]] || [[word:zæpæwæsh|zæpæwæsh]] || [[word:zæpæwæ|zæpæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapapawath|zapapawath]] || [[word:zapapawaj|zapapawaj]] || [[word:zapapawash|zapapawash]] || [[word:zapapawa|zapapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapawath|zapawath]] || [[word:zapawaj|zapawaj]] || [[word:zapawash|zapawash]] || [[word:zapawa|zapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapafwath|zapafwath]] || [[word:zapafwaj|zapafwaj]] || [[word:zapafwash|zapafwash]] || [[word:zapafwaf|zapafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zapawatha|zapawatha]] || [[word:zapawaja|zapawaja]] || [[word:zapawasha|zapawasha]] || [[word:zapawaka|zapawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zapawath|zapawath]] || [[word:zapawaj|zapawaj]] || [[word:zapawash|zapawash]] || [[word:zapawa|zapawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zapawathal|zapawathal]] || [[word:zapawajal|zapawajal]] || [[word:zapawashal|zapawashal]] || [[word:zapawakal|zapawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zapawathatha|zapawathatha]] || [[word:zapawajaja|zapawajaja]] || [[word:zapawashasha|zapawashasha]] || [[word:zapawaka|zapawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zapawathan|zapawathan]] || [[word:zapawajan|zapawajan]] || [[word:zapawashan|zapawashan]] || [[word:zapawakan|zapawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zapawathaoro|zapawathaoro]] || [[word:zapawajaoro|zapawajaoro]] || [[word:zapawashaoro|zapawashaoro]] || [[word:zapawakaoro|zapawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
